summary: The weather for the upcoming period in Tokyo will be a mix of cloudy, rainy, and sunny days. Significant rain is expected on April 7th and 10th, while the weekend of April 11-12th will be warmer and mostly sunny. Temperatures will range from a low of 8°C to a high of 25°C.

forecast.description: Cloudy throughout the day with a 30% chance of precipitation.
Rainy conditions likely with high humidity and cooler temperatures.
Clear skies and sunny weather with a cool start in the morning.
Cloudy periods mixed with clear intervals throughout the day.
Cloudy with periodic rain and a 60-70% chance of precipitation.
Mostly sunny and significantly warmer temperatures.
Continued warm weather with mostly sunny to partly cloudy skies.
Cloudy with some periodic clearing and mild temperatures.
Cloudy conditions expected for the majority of the day.
